message:
test(session): add comprehensive unit tests for session package (ntm-kh1j)

Add 18 unit tests covering session state and storage operations:

State tests:
- AgentConfig.Total(): counts all agent types correctly

Filename sanitization tests:
- sanitizeFilename(): handles all special characters (/, \, :, *, ?, ", <, >, |)

Storage directory tests:
- StorageDir(): respects XDG_DATA_HOME, falls back to ~/.local/share

Storage operation tests:
- Save(): basic save, custom name, no-overwrite, overwrite
- Load(): basic load, not found error
- Delete(): basic delete, not found error
- Exists(): true and false cases
- List(): empty dir, multiple sessions, session info, sort order

All tests use t.TempDir() and XDG_DATA_HOME override for isolation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
